title: Pass 5.A.4: ferrotorch-distributed gloo/mpi/ucc skeleton backends publicly re-exported
description:
Pass 4 finding (umbrella #982) — ferrotorch-distributed audit, STUB bucket (3 findings).

`gloo`, `mpi`, `ucc` backends are skeleton implementations re-exported from crate root. Users following the crate-level docs see them as first-class options; in practice they're not wired and return errors / no-ops.

Acceptance:
- Either implement at least one of the three to working-conformance level, OR
- Remove from public re-exports + document gloo/mpi/ucc as 'planned, see crosslink #...'
- gpu_collective NCCL placeholder also flagged in same audit; bundle if scope permits.
